headings.text: Lead times in as fast as 1 day are possible on eligible parts. Use the reference table to help determine which lead time works best for your injection-molded parts.

meta_description: Lead times in as fast as 1 day are possible on eligible 3D-printed, machined, and injection-molded parts.
